commit_message:
[rtl/xbus2axi4lite_bridge] fix back-to-back wishbone transfers [rtl/xbus2axi4lite_bridge] fix back-to-back wishbone transfers Hi!

This PR fixes the converter when wishbone transfer is back-to-back. When the stb signal is continuously high, the ready signal won't be reset and causes arvalid/awvalid pulse of the next transfer disappear (in the following pic). rvalid and bvalid condition are added to ensure the handshake signals are correctly generated.

![wb2axi4](https://github.com/user-atta
